title: Educational Series Structure Plan
purpose: Define chapter-wise teaching structure for Tuesday Learning Series using AG24C calendar lanes and AG24B scoring gates, without selecting topics or generating episodes.

chapter_frames.purpose: Introduce the learning question, season promise, reader benefit and scope boundary.
Explain origin, vocabulary and why the concept matters.
Teach the basic structure or mechanism in simple but disciplined form.
Show how the topic is known, sourced, debated or verified.
Translate the concept into an example, public system, historical case or practical scenario.
Use diagrams, tables, concept maps, timelines or examples to improve understanding.
Explain how readers can apply the concept or interpret related real-world situations.
Record caveats, competing views, limitations and misuse risks.

chapter_frames.chapter_role: Comparison with adjacent ideas or systems
chapter_frames.purpose: Compare with related concepts, schools, methods, systems or interpretations.
Discuss what is changing, unresolved or likely to matter next.
Help the reader consolidate what was learned and reflect on its meaning.
Summarise the season and prepare continuation, archive, or adjacent series planning.

educational_archetypes.label: Vedic Mathematics Learning Series
educational_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
educational_archetypes.source_caution: No unsupported scriptural attribution; Sanskrit and historical claims require source discipline.

educational_archetypes.label: Genetics and Mutations Learning Series
educational_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
educational_archetypes.source_caution: Scientific and health-related claims require credible references and non-medical-advice framing.

educational_archetypes.label: Engines and Technology Evolution Learning Series
educational_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
educational_archetypes.source_caution: Technical claims must separate simplified explanation from engineering precision.

educational_archetypes.label: Health Diagnosis Fundamentals Learning Series
educational_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
educational_archetypes.source_caution: Must not provide diagnosis or treatment advice; must remain educational and source-backed.

educational_archetypes.label: AI for Public Systems Learning Series
educational_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
educational_archetypes.source_caution: Public-system claims require policy, institutional, technical or credible editorial source checks.

supabase_reminder: Hybrid staged path remains selected: static/GitHub-controlled go-live first; Supabase/Auth/backend later only after explicit review and approval.
